title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Nine Asia-Pacific markets are operationalizing compliance regimes simultaneously across Q3 2026, creating the region's densest institutional procurement window since MiCA passed in Europe. Australia shifts from Travel Rule implementation to active enforcement while Philippines' BSP pushes ongoing VASP registration deadlines and South Korea opens consultation on institutional custody frameworks. title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: AMLA becomes operational Q3 with direct supervision authority over Europe's highest-risk crypto firms while the European Commission's MiCA review consultation (31 Aug deadline) determines how DeFi protocols and NFTs fit into the regulatory framework through 2027.
